---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a feature, an API change, or a new ADR
title: "[feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## What problem are you trying to solve

<!--
Two or three sentences. The use case, not the proposed solution yet.
"I want X because Y" works better than "Regesta should do X".
-->

## Why the current behavior doesn't suffice

<!--
What did you try? Why isn't it enough? If a workaround exists, name it
and say why it isn't acceptable for your use case.
-->

## Proposed shape

<!--
A sketch of the API, schema, or behavior you'd like. Pseudocode is fine.
If the change is structural (new IR shape, new compiler pass, new
plugin contract), this is where the discussion of an ADR starts — see
docs/adr/.
-->

```clojure
;; rough sketch
```

## Out of scope, deliberately

<!--
What you are *not* asking for. Useful for keeping the discussion
narrow.
-->

## Sprint mapping

<!--
If the request fits a planned sprint from the README roadmap, name it.
"Sprint 7 (Dublin Core)" is more useful than "soon".
-->
